'''popamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meadowless|meadowless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meadowless|meadowless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| popamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:popamithi|popamithi]] || [[word:popamiji|popamiji]] || [[word:popamishi|popamishi]] || [[word:popamiki|popamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:popamuthuthu|popamuthuthu]] || [[word:popamujuju|popamujuju]] || [[word:popamushushu|popamushushu]] || [[word:popamukuku|popamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:popamuthu|popamuthu]] || [[word:popamuju|popamuju]] || [[word:popamushu|popamushu]] || [[word:popamuku|popamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:popamufthuf|popamufthuf]] || [[word:popamufjuf|popamufjuf]] || [[word:popamufshuf|popamufshuf]] || [[word:popamufkuf|popamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:popamethe|popamethe]] || [[word:popameje|popameje]] || [[word:popameshe|popameshe]] || [[word:popameke|popameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:popamothotho|popamothotho]] || [[word:popamojojo|popamojojo]] || [[word:popamoshosho|popamoshosho]] || [[word:popamokoko|popamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:popamotho|popamotho]] || [[word:popamojo|popamojo]] || [[word:popamosho|popamosho]] || [[word:popamoko|popamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:popamofthof|popamofthof]] || [[word:popamofjof|popamofjof]] || [[word:popamofshof|popamofshof]] || [[word:popamofkof|popamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:popamÃŸfthÃŸf|popamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfjÃŸf|popamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfshÃŸf|popamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfkÃŸf|popamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:popamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|popamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|popamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|popamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|popamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:popamÃŸfthÃŸf|popamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfjÃŸf|popamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfshÃŸf|popamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfkÃŸf|popamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:popamÃŸfthÃŸf|popamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfjÃŸf|popamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfshÃŸf|popamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:popamÃŸfkÃŸf|popamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:popamÃḊthÃḊ|popamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:popamÃḊjÃḊ|popamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:popamÃḊshÃḊ|popamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:popamÃḊkÃḊ|popamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:popamathatha|popamathatha]] || [[word:popamajaja|popamajaja]] || [[word:popamashasha|popamashasha]] || [[word:popamakaka|popamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:popamatha|popamatha]] || [[word:popamaja|popamaja]] || [[word:popamasha|popamasha]] || [[word:popamaka|popamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:popamafthaf|popamafthaf]] || [[word:popamafjaf|popamafjaf]] || [[word:popamafshaf|popamafshaf]] || [[word:popamafkaf|popamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:popamasha|popamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:popamshÃḋsha|popamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:popamrosha|popamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:popamusha|popamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:popamyasha|popamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopopamnkshÃḋsha|gopopamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopopamnkrosha|gopopamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopopamnkmusha|gopopamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopopamnkyasha|gopopamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:popapamasha|popapamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:popapamshÃḋsha|popapamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:popapamrosha|popapamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:popapamusha|popapamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:popapamyasha|popapamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopopapamnkshÃḋsha|gopopapamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopopapamnkrosha|gopopapamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopopapamnkmusha|gopopapamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopopapamnkyasha|gopopapamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pepÃḊmasha|pepÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pepÃḊmshÃḋsha|pepÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pepÃḊmrosha|pepÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pepÃḊmusha|pepÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pepÃḊmyasha|pepÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopepÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|gopepÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopepÃḊmnkrosha|gopepÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopepÃḊmnkmusha|gopepÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopepÃḊmnkyasha|gopepÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:popfamasha|popfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:popfamshÃḋsha|popfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:popfamrosha|popfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:popfamusha|popfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:popfamyasha|popfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopopfamnkshÃḋsha|gopopfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopopfamnkrosha|gopopfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopopfamnkmusha|gopopfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopopfamnkyasha|gopopfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
